description:
cloudstack_secondary_ipaddress

Assigns a secondary IP to a NIC.

argument_reference.name: ip_address
argument_reference.description: The IP address to bind the to NIC. If not supplied an IP address will be selected randomly. Changing this forces a new resource to be created.

argument_reference.name: nic_id
argument_reference.description: The NIC ID to which you want to attach the secondary IP address. Changing this forces a new resource to be created (defaults to the ID of the primary NIC)

argument_reference.name: virtual_machine_id
argument_reference.description: The ID of the virtual machine to which you want to attach the secondary IP address. Changing this forces a new resource to be created.

attributes_reference.name: ip_address
attributes_reference.description: The IP address that was acquired and associated.
